summary: School Intelligence unification feature tested successfully. Main column School Intelligence link enhanced with 'View full analysis' CTA and id='school-intelligence' anchor. Right panel old School Insight card removed, replaced with compact School Fit preview that scrolls to main column. AI Assist button renamed from 'Analyze School Fit' to 'Explore School Intelligence' with updated helper text.

context_for_next_testing_agent: School Intelligence unification complete. Key data-testid selectors: school-intel-link (main column), school-fit-preview (right panel), school-fit-view-analysis (view link), ai-school-insight-btn (AI button). #school-intelligence is the scroll anchor. LOGIN: Use page.fill() for email/password then page.press('Enter').
